commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d1e1a036691c3eb2e414db25aa7f4fbe573f37da)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an option to `dropThinkingBlocks`, uses it to strip GitHub Copilot Claude assistant thinking blocks during session-history replay, and updates focused replay/thinking tests.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +5. Total +14 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: Copilot Claude replay policy enables `dropThinkingBlocks`, but the unchanged stream-transform call still uses the default latest-assistant preservation behavior. I did not run a live Copilot request in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs human/contributor follow-up for the stream-transform gap and real Copilot Claude proof; do not queue repair automation while the contributor proof gate is unmet.

target.title: fix(copilot): drop thinking blocks from replay
target.body:
## Summary
- strip thinking blocks from GitHub Copilot Claude replay history instead of preserving the latest assistant reasoning turn
- keep the existing default latest-assistant preservation behavior for other providers/callers
- cover Copilot replay cases for text, thinking-only turns, and tool calls

Fixes #81520

## Validation
- ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/thinking.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/replay-history.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/thinking.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts
- ./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/thinking.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/replay-history.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/thinking.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts
- git diff --check
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/thinking.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/provider-runtime.contract.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/stream.test.ts --reporter=dot

Note: pnpm check:changed currently fails on origin/main with TS1117 in src/agents/tool-display-config.ts due duplicate transcripts keys at lines 350 and 595; this branch does not touch that file.
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
